message:
feat(fcp-host, fwc): doctor diagnostic refactor, integration test expansion, and fwc CLI enhancements

fcp-host/doctor.rs: Refactor diagnostic report to improve error
message clarity and formatting consistency.

fcp-host/tests/no_mock_integration.rs: Expand integration test
coverage for host connector lifecycle.

fwc/main.rs: CLI enhancements and feature additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
